value.found_quote: Use Codex in Linear to delegate work from issues. Assign an issue to Codex or mention `@Codex` in a comment, and Codex creates a cloud task and replies with progress and results.
value.rationale: The page describes delegating work to Codex from Linear issues by assigning or mentioning @Codex, and also covers connecting the Linear MCP server for local tasks. It is described as available on paid plans, indicating active status.
